name: Tee Box St. George
address: 476 E Riverside Dr b7, St. George, UT 84790
about: Tee Box St. George is an indoor golf training facility that uses Trackman technology to provide data-driven coaching and practice. The venue offers a variety of services including swing analysis, club fittings, fitness programs, and simulator-based play. It is designed for golfers looking to improve their game through technology, coaching, and community, with amenities like a gym, putting green, and event spaces. Pricing and memberships are available for access to the facilities and equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Trackman technology for precise swing analysis
Integrated fitness and nutrition programs for holistic player development
24-hour access for flexible practice and training schedules
Versatile event spaces for group outings and corporate functions
Comprehensive club fitting and repair services

food_and_drink.notes: No bar or alcohol service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end radar and camera-based tracking system in every bay

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent clubs at the facility. The venue also offers professional club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned, but there are no on-site dining options available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content suggests 30 minutes at Tee Box is comparable to 90 minutes on the course, so 18 holes could be completed in about 30 minutes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Box St. George offers youth programs and a welcoming atmosphere for families.
